Phase-6.NAME: Device registry and limit-aware migration
Phase-6.goal: Introduce device registry with lifecycle state and per-plan device limits.
Phase-6.step-1: M-020: Add per-plan device limit fields and device registry model.
Phase-6.step-2: M-003/M-020: Refactor VPNClient linkage from per-user to device-bound peer.
Phase-6.step-3: M-020: Migrate existing users to deterministic primary device.
